case_title: MAZZA, SAM vs. SOUTHARD, MARIE E. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHARD, MARIE E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 299 COLE STREET, #4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,152.00 RENT, $3,160.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,312.00, SAID IMMEDIATE POSSESSION SHALL BE STAYED FOR A PERIOD OF TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. THE $3,160.00 IS FOR COSTS AND REASONABLE ATTYS FEES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
